diagrams.title: Iron Triangle (Triple Constraint)
diagrams.description: Shows the three interdependent constraints that define project success
diagrams.purpose: Understanding that balancing scope, time, and cost is essential for project success - changing one affects others

diagrams.title: Project Success vs Product Success
diagrams.description: Two-dimensional view of project outcomes based on meeting constraints and business value
elements: Four quadrants: Success, Partial Success, Failure zones
diagrams.purpose: Distinguishing between meeting project constraints vs achieving real business outcomes

diagrams.title: Risk vs Issue Matrix
diagrams.description: Comparison of risks (future potential events) and issues (current problems)
diagrams.purpose: Understanding the difference between proactive risk management and reactive issue resolution

diagrams.title: Project Failure Cascade
diagrams.description: Flowchart showing how one failure leads to another in troubled projects
elements: Poor Planning → Unrealistic Schedule → Rushed Work → Quality Issues → User Dissatisfaction → Project Failure
diagrams.purpose: Visualizing how initial problems compound and lead to ultimate project failure

visuals.title: Project Success And Failure
visuals.description: Visual diagram for project success and failure
